			NOT = { has_advance = nav_memories_reconquista }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_1_traditions
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_iberia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_navarre_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					has_or_had_tag = NAV
					is_basque_spain = yes
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = nav_memories_reconquista
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_1_traditions
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:nav_memories_reconquista
	}

			NOT = { has_advance = scottish_highland_tradition }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_1_traditions
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_great_britain_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_scottish_lowlands_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					has_or_had_tag = SCO
					culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:scottish_group }
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = scottish_highland_tradition
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_1_traditions
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:scottish_highland_tradition
	}

					}
					}
					AND = {
					original_capital ?= {
					sub_continent = sub_continent:east_africa
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = eastern_african_trade
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_1_traditions
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}

					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_1_traditions
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_america
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_alaska_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_aridoamerica_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_canada_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_caribbean_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_central_america_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_east_coast_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_great_plains_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_mesoamerica_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_west_coast_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_xalisco_area
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_zacatecas_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					is_capital_in_south_america = yes
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = mountain_roads
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_1_traditions
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:mountain_roads
	}

			NOT = { has_advance = great_three }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_2_renaissance
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_tibet_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_tsang_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = TIB
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = great_three
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_2_renaissance
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:great_three
	}

			NOT = { has_advance = cossacks_recruitment }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_2_renaissance
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_estate_cossacks
					}
					}
					AND = {
					country_has_estate = estate_type:cossacks_estate
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = cossacks_recruitment
					has_embraced_institution = institution:professional_armies
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_2_renaissance
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:cossacks_recruitment
	}

					}

					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = slash_and_burn
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3

			NOT = { has_advance = ramadan }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_2_renaissance
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_muslim
					}
					}
					AND = {
					religion.group = religion_group:muslim
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = ramadan
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_2_renaissance
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:ramadan
	}

			NOT = { has_advance = suk_wat_si_sawai }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_3_discovery
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_indochina_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_chao_phraya_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = SUK
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = suk_wat_si_sawai
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3

				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_3_discovery
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_japan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_saikaidou_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					has_or_had_tag = SHN
					has_or_had_tag = SOU
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = shn_diplomacy_through_tsushima
					has_embraced_institution = institution:new_world
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3

					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_3_discovery
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_orthodox
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					religion = religion:orthodox
					religion = religion:miaphysite
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = theotokos
					has_embraced_institution = institution:printing_press
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_3_discovery
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:theotokos
	}

hafp_research_age_4_reformation_custom = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = generic_bureaucracy_4_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					}
					}
					AND = {
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = generic_bureaucracy_4_advance
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:generic_bureaucracy_4_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = viceroyalty_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					}
					}
					AND = {
					culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:iberian_group }
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = viceroyalty_advance
					has_embraced_institution = institution:global_trade
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:viceroyalty_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_war_galleon }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					}
					}
					AND = {
					original_capital ?= { continent = continent:europe }
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = unlock_war_galleon
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:unlock_war_galleon
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_galleass_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					}
					}
					AND = {
					NOT = { culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:italian_group } }
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = unlock_galleass_advance
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:unlock_galleass_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = italian_galleass }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					}
					}
					AND = {
					culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:italian_group }
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = italian_galleass
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:italian_galleass
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_cakradonya }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					culture = culture:acehnese_culture
					culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:acehnese_culture }
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = unlock_cakradonya
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:unlock_cakradonya
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_galiot }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					}
					}
					AND = {
					original_capital ?= {
					OR = {
					region = region:iberia_region

			NOT = { has_advance = bul_the_bulgarian_gunpowder_foundries }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_balkan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_bulgaria_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = BUL
					original_tag = BUL
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = bul_the_bulgarian_gunpowder_foundries
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}

					}
					}
				}

			NOT = { has_advance = suk_sukhothai_ceramics }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_4_reformation
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_indochina_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_chao_phraya_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = SUK
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = suk_sukhothai_ceramics
					has_embraced_institution = institution:global_trade
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:suk_sukhothai_ceramics
	}

					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_deccan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_east_china_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_egypt_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_hindustan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_iberia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_indochina_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_indonesia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_japan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_khorasan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_korea_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_macaronesia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_maghreb_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_manchuria_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_mongolia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_north_china_region

					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_south_china_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_tibet_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_west_china_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_western_india_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_xinjiang_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_eastern_khorasan_area
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_western_khorasan_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					religion = religion:mahayana
					religion = religion:sanjiao
					}
					any_international_organizations_member_of = {
					OR = {
					international_organization_has_policy = policy:confucianism_policy
					international_organization_has_policy = policy:daoism_policy
					}
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = three_teachings
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_4_reformation
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:three_teachings

					}

hafp_research_age_5_absolutism_generic = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = sanitation_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = sanitation_advance
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_5_absolutism
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:sanitation_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = manufactories_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = manufactories_advance
					has_embraced_institution = institution:manufactories
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_5_absolutism
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:manufactories_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = central_bank_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = central_bank_advance
					has_embraced_institution = institution:banking
					has_embraced_institution = institution:manufactories
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_5_absolutism
						}

hafp_research_age_5_absolutism_custom = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = tribal_cultural_identity_law_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism
					}
					}
					AND = {
					government_type = government_type:tribe
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = tribal_cultural_identity_law_advance
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_5_absolutism
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:tribal_cultural_identity_law_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_legionaries_5_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_africa
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_anatolia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_balkan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_carpathia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_caucasus_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_crescent_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_egypt_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_france_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_great_britain_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_iberia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_italy_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_maghreb_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_south_german_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_societal_value = societal_value_type:latinization_vs_hellenization
					has_or_had_tag = ROM
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = unlock_legionaries_5_advance
					has_embraced_institution = institution:military_revolution
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_5_absolutism
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:unlock_legionaries_5_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_varangians_5_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_balkan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_area_thrace_area
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = BYZ
					}
					}

			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_balkan_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					OR = {
					culture = culture:bosnian
					culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:bosnian }
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = bosnian_people_from_the_hills
					has_embraced_institution = institution:manufactories
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_5_absolutism
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:bosnian_people_from_the_hills

			NOT = { has_advance = dal_morlach_frontier_levies }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_culture_dalmatian
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_or_had_tag = DAL
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = dal_morlach_frontier_levies
					has_embraced_institution = institution:military_revolution
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_5_absolutism
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:dal_morlach_frontier_levies
	}

		research_advance = advance_type:harae
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = jisha_bugyou }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_5_absolutism
					has_variable = hafp_g_f_religion_shinto
					}
					}
					AND = {
					religion = religion:shinto
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = jisha_bugyou
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_5_absolutism
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:jisha_bugyou
	}
}

hafp_research_age_6_revolutions_custom = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_archipelago_frigate }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_6_revolutions
					}
					}
					AND = {
					original_capital ?= {
					OR = {
					region = region:scandinavian_region
					region = region:north_german_region
					region = region:baltic_region
					region = region:russian_region
					}
					}
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = unlock_archipelago_frigate
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_6_revolutions
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:unlock_archipelago_frigate
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = tribal_modernization_law_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_6_revolutions
					}
					}
					AND = {
					government_type = government_type:tribe
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = tribal_modernization_law_advance
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3
							current_age = age_6_revolutions
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:tribal_modernization_law_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = unlock_legionaries_6_advance }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_6_revolutions
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_africa
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_asia
					has_variable = hafp_g_cont_europe
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_anatolia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_balkan_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_carpathia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_caucasus_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_crescent_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_egypt_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_france_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_great_britain_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_iberia_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_italy_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_maghreb_region
					has_variable = hafp_g_reg_south_german_region
					}
					}
					AND = {
					has_societal_value = societal_value_type:latinization_vs_hellenization
					has_or_had_tag = ROM
					}
					}
				}
				AND = {
					has_advance_available = unlock_legionaries_6_advance
					has_embraced_institution = institution:levee_en_masse
					OR = {
						"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 1
						AND = {
							"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 3

		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = contacts_network }
			OR = {
				AND = {
					"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" = 2
					OR = {
					AND = {
					has_variable = hafp_enabled
					OR = {
					has_variable = hafp_all_advances_enabled
					has_variable = hafp_g_age_age_6_revolutions

hafp_research_age_6_revolutions = {
	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions_generic = yes
	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions_custom = yes
}

hafp_research_no_age_generic = {
}

hafp_research_no_age_custom = {
}

hafp_research_no_age = {
	hafp_research_no_age_generic = yes
	hafp_research_no_age_custom = yes
}

hafp_research_custom = {
	hafp_research_age_1_traditions_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_2_renaissance_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_3_discovery_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_4_reformation_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_5_absolutism_custom = yes
	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions_custom = yes
	hafp_research_no_age_custom = yes
}

hafp_research_all = {
	hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions = yes
	hafp_research_no_age = yes
}

hafp_research_current_era = {
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_1_traditions }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_2_renaissance }
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_3_discovery }
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_4_reformation }
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_5_absolutism }
		hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_6_revolutions }
		hafp_research_age_6_revolutions = yes
	}
}

hafp_research_previous_eras = {
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_2_renaissance }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_3_discovery }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_4_reformation }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_5_absolutism }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_6_revolutions }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
		hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	}
}
